identity.name: CONER - Consultores Especializados en Retiros
identity.emotional_goal: Reassurance through precision and elegance. The user feels they are accessing a premium service.

grid_systems.landing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 (Hero centered: col-start-2 col-end-12)

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#B5952F] font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] h-14 px-6 rounded-sm transition-all

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-lg shadow-xl

components.toasts: Use Sonner. Style: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#D4AF37]/20 text-white

animations.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom gold colors (#D4AF37) as 'gold'.
Set the font family in standard CSS: Heading -> Playfair Display, Body -> Lato.
Ensure all backgrounds use the dark palette (#050505). NEVER use pure black (#000000) for large surfaces, only for contrast.
The 'Result Page' must look like a high-end bank statement or certificate.
Use the provided Logo in the Header (Left aligned) and Footer (Centered).
Admin panel must be protected and distinct, but share the dark theme.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid gradients for text unless it's a specific gold effect.
Use data-testid on all inputs and buttons.
Do not center text in the body paragraphs; keep it left-aligned for readability.
